case_title: MASONIC MEMORIAL TEMPLE,CALIF NOT FOR PROFIT CORP vs. BROWN, GARY et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, IRINA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MASONIC MEMORIAL TEMPLE,CALIF NOT FOR PROFIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, GARY BROWN, IRINA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER & ORDER ISSUE WROT OF POSSESSION FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF MASONIC MEMORIAL TEMPLE,CALIF NOT FOR PROFIT CORP
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, GARY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSATISFIED; SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, GARY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MASONIC MEMORIAL TEMPLE,CALIF NOT FOR PROFIT CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, GARY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1060 PINE STREET APT. #6 $1,296.64 RENT, $472.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,928.64, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT TO PAY $1,296.64 AT EXECUTION OF THIS JUDGMENT. AND $52.66 IN 12 EQUAL INSTALLMENTS ON THE FIFTEENTH OF EACH MONTH FOR 12 CONSECUTIVE MONTHS BEGINNING 3/15/95 AND ENDING 2/15/96 FOR PAYMENT OF ATTORNEY FEES AND COST OF SUIT. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
